name: Aim Trainer Asylum
short_description: Aim Trainer Asylum is a horror aim trainer with stylized black and white visuals. Survive all 4 nights in the asylum with varying difficulty levels and spooky monsters to escape!
detailed_description:
Overview

Can you survive four long nights in the Aim Trainer Asylum? Play through visually rich aim training levels while avoiding monsters of the night... or simple figments of your imagination.

Gameplay

Tired? Unwell? Seeing things? Encounter different nightmare creatures in your dreams testing your aim training skills against them. Featuring 6 different difficulty modes, both casual and competitive players can find success in the Asylum. Survive all nights in Aim Trainer Asylum featuring dark fantasy visuals. Like a traditional Aim Trainer, there will be varying familiar aim training scenarios you can play through.

Horror Content- Body parts, blood, fictional gore characters

- Loud noises, scary music, jump scares, mild flashing lights

- Depiction of fictional insanity, asylum setting

Credits

Thank you to... YOU :)
